description: Composition Violet and white striped polo neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, ribbed collar with a buttoned chest placket, graphic print on the left chest, and a vented hem Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash with warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry Warm iron No dry cleaning Nothing exudes class and elegance as much as a Levi's polo neck T-shirt. Wear this classic style to any off-duty event to look your stylish best. Pair it with classic denims and suede shoes to snazz up your style. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
